# clangd C++ test

# Start acme-lsp server
acme-lsp -headless -server '\.cpp$:clangd' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.cpp after-format.txt

# Definition of virtual function "hello" from call site
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#343'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:  virtual void hello\(std::string name\) = 0;'

# References to variable "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#311'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:  Greeter \*g = new WorldGreeter\(\);'
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:  g->hello\("world"\);'
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:  delete g;'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#365'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:class Greeter {'

# Signature of "hello" call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#346'
L -headless sig
stdout 'hello\(std::string name\) -> void'

# Hover over method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#343'
L -headless hov -p
stdout 'instance-method hello'
stdout '→ void'
stdout 'Parameters:'
stdout '- std::string name \(aka basic_string<char>\)'
stdout '// In Greeter'
stdout 'public: virtual void hello\(std::string name\) = 0'

# Implementations of the class Greeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#48'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello\.cpp:.*:class WorldGreeter : public Greeter {'

# Completion after "g->"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#340'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello\(std::string name\)	void'

# Symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter class'
stdout 'WorldGreeter class'
stdout 'main int \(\)'
stdout 'hello void \(std::string\)'
stdout '/hello\.cpp:'

# Rename Greeter to BaseGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.cpp:'#48'
L -headless rn BaseGreeter
cmp hello.cpp after-rename.txt

-- hello.cpp --
#include <iostream>
#include <string>

class Greeter {
public:	virtual ~Greeter() {}
		virtual void hello(std::string name) = 0; };

class WorldGreeter:public Greeter {
public: void hello(std::string name) override {
		std::cout << "Hello, " << name << "!" << std::endl; }};

int main() {
	Greeter* g = new WorldGreeter();
	g->hello("world");
	delete g;
	return 0; }
-- after-format.txt --
#include <iostream>
#include <string>

class Greeter {
public:
  virtual ~Greeter() {}
  virtual void hello(std::string name) = 0;
};

class WorldGreeter : public Greeter {
public:
  void hello(std::string name) override {
    std::cout << "Hello, " << name << "!" << std::endl;
  }
};

int main() {
  Greeter *g = new WorldGreeter();
  g->hello("world");
  delete g;
  return 0;
}
-- after-rename.txt --
#include <iostream>
#include <string>

class BaseGreeter {
public:
  virtual ~BaseGreeter() {}
  virtual void hello(std::string name) = 0;
};

class WorldGreeter : public BaseGreeter {
public:
  void hello(std::string name) override {
    std::cout << "Hello, " << name << "!" << std::endl;
  }
};

int main() {
  BaseGreeter *g = new WorldGreeter();
  g->hello("world");
  delete g;
  return 0;
}
